config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. In my view, society works best when individual rights are protected first, because once the state or the majority can override them too easily, abuse becomes much easier. I do think society can limit some rights in clear cases like public safety or disaster response, but those limits should be narrow and justified, not the default. From my perspective, the health of society depends on respecting the dignity and freedom of each person, not treating individuals as disposable for a collective goal.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh mayoritas atau negara. Hak individu memang tidak absolut, tetapi justru hak-hak itu yang melindungi orang dari keputusan kolektif yang sewenang-wenang, terutama ketika masyarakat panik atau menganggap tujuan besar lebih penting daripada martabat seseorang. Saya setuju bahwa ada keadaan darurat tertentu yang memerlukan pembatasan terbatas, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” sering hanya menjadi kata lain untuk menekan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because in practice that usually gives too much power to the state or the majority. From an Indonesian perspective, I am especially wary of vague claims about “the public good,” because they can be used to silence dissent, pressure minorities, or excuse abuses in the name of harmony. That said, I do believe there are limited situations like public health emergencies, disasters, or security threats where some individual freedoms can be restricted, but only temporarily and with clear accountability. So for me, society matters, but it is healthier and more legitimate when it is built on protected individual rights, not on sacrificing people whenever a collective goal is invoked.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikorbankan demi “kepentingan masyarakat” yang sering didefinisikan terlalu longgar. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika Serikat, sejarah kita penuh dengan contoh bagaimana mayoritas atau negara bisa memakai bahasa ketertiban, keamanan, atau kebaikan bersama untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap kelompok kecil. Memang ada keadaan darurat yang sah untuk membatasi kebebasan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum. Kalau hak individu tidak diprioritaskan, masyarakat justru kehilangan dasar moral yang melindungi orang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of social harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how vague ideas like “the public good” can be used to pressure minorities or silence criticism. Society is stronger when individual rights are the baseline and any limits are narrow, temporary, and clearly accountable. If we flip that order, it becomes too easy for the state or the majority to excuse abuse in the name of unity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh menjadi prioritas umum atas hak individu, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat betapa mudahnya bahasa “kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Poin tentang keadaan darurat memang valid, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasan harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan alasan default untuk mengorbankan hak orang. Kalau hak individu ditempatkan di bawah kepentingan kolektif, kelompok yang paling rentan biasanya yang paling cepat dirugikan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat dibangun dari perlindungan martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang, bukan dari kebiasaan mengalahkan individu demi tujuan yang didefinisikan terlalu longgar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
